creator: lifanov@mail.lifanov.com
text:
Created attachment 144854
sysutils/ansible 1.6.6 -> 1.6.7

Please update sysutils/ansible to 1.6.7.
Changelog: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ansible/ansible/v1.6.7/CHANGELOG.md

This fixes CVE-2014-4966, CVE-2014-4967 (CVEs are published for Puppet, but are fixed in Ansible also).

This change also includes correct (for Ansible) CPE information (supersedes Bugzilla bug id 191773).
